articles.title: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold squeezes a lot of functionality into a tiny folding mouse
articles.description: Logitech finally announced its new ultraportable travel mouse following leaked marketing images that spoiled the surprise last month. As the name implies, the Mobi Fold is a compact mouse that can  fold in half using a hinge that can pivot about 130 degrees. At $79.99 in graphite, off-white, lilac, and sand color options, the Mobi […]
articles.author: Andrew Liszewski
